name: b2_route_mapping_smoke_T1_atlanta
translation_honesty: This B2 smoke benchmark models wrong next-hop behavior as a route-mapping error. Two routed-prefix traffic classes are sent to a router. The control update maps Prefix A to Gateway A and Prefix B to Gateway B. The faulty update swaps the next-hop mapping, allowing Prefix A to reach Gateway B. The checked property forbids Prefix A from reaching Gateway B.

embedding.meaning: B2 checks route mapping correctness. Prefix A should be routed to Gateway A. The faulty route update maps Prefix A to Gateway B, while the control update maps Prefix A to Gateway A.
